title: Ichnanthus nemorosus
taxonomy: Ichnanthus nemorosus is a species of grass, belonging to the family Poaceae. It is part of the subfamily Panicoideae and tribe Paniceae. The genus Ichnanthus is native to Central and South America, with Ichnanthus nemorosus being one of its species found in this region. The classification of Ichnanthus nemorosus is further categorized within the kingdom Plantae and the domain Eukaryota. This classification helps to understand the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the plant species.
